title: fedia carinata
intro: Fedia carinata, also known as Horned Poppy or Horned Cachrys, is a perennial plant in the carrot family native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Fedia carinata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Fedia carinata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
